sources.solar_pv: NREL ATB 2025 — Utility PV, Moderate scenario, 2024 USD
sources.bess: Lazard LCOS V18.0 (2024) + NREL Storage Futures Study
sources.gas_rice: NREL ATB 2025 — Natural Gas CT (RICE proxy), 2024 USD
sources.common: Project finance assumptions per methodology document

solar_pv.description: Utility-scale fixed-tilt ground-mount. DC-side nameplate. Includes inverters, racking, balance-of-plant, EPC, interconnection, and soft costs. Apply ISO capex_multiplier.

bess.description: 4-hour AC-coupled BESS. $/kWh covers energy capacity (cells + BMS + PCS + EPC). Power electronics embedded in $/kWh for standard 4-hr units. Apply ISO capex_multiplier. Augmentation covers cell degradation replacement.

gas_rice.description: Reciprocating Internal Combustion Engine (RICE). Installed cost including genset, fuel system, cooling, emissions controls, EPC. Gas cost modelled separately via ISO gas_price_per_mmbtu. Apply ISO capex_multiplier.

common.description: Unlevered real WACC. Project life used for CRF calculation across all technologies (shorter-lived assets get replacement cost annualized over project life).
